title: Human Approval & PDF Rendering
description: Present the completed Chen financial plan to the supervising advisor for review and approval, then render the final deliverable PDF. Approval workflow includes: advisor review of complete document, sign-off on recommendations, and any final revisions. PDF output must include: all sections (client-profile through analysis), open items disclosure page listing all unresolved gaps (SS statements, Boeing pension, cost basis, estate docs), source attribution page for all public facts used, and advisor signature/approval date. Out of scope: substantive analysis changes—those require cycling back to earlier tasks.
